name: BackNine Insurance API
description: BackNine is a tech-enabled general agency for life insurance. This API provides endpoints for getting quotes, creating eApps (electronic applications), managing eApp access, resuming eApps, updating quotes, managing insured data, advancing eApp steps, sending text messages, and downloading illustrations.
